//: IDE-only tsconfig for .design-sync/previews/*.tsx. The converter uses tsconfig.bundle.json (cfg.tsconfig); this file exists ONLY so the editor's TS service resolves the converter-internal '@ds-stories/*' alias instead of flagging 'cannot find module'. Does NOT alias video.js/wavesurfer to mocks (the bundle tsconfig does that for runtime) — the IDE wants the REAL types, same as the root tsconfig. NOT referenced by the app build — root tsconfig's '**' glob skips dot-dirs, so .design-sync is never type-checked by `npm run type-check`.
